CustomField.label: Teams Meeting ID
CustomField.description: Microsoft Graph onlineMeeting ID for the Teams meeting associated with this booking. Populated by OA_BookingPoller Step 1.5 via PATCH recordAutomatically=true. Used by OA_ArtifactPoller as the key for /recordings and /transcripts retrieval. When set, Step 1.5 is skipped on reprocessing (idempotency).
